items.claim: Cody Gibson has a height and reach disadvantage against Abdul Husan.
items.quote: a bit of a height and reach disadvantage, advantage, whatever you want to call it.

items.claim: Abdul Husan hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025, representing a layoff.
items.quote: hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025. Uh so a little bit of a layoff coming into this fight.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off back-to-back losses including a first-round finish against Rinya Satoh (referred to as Richi Lang).
items.quote: coming off back-to-back losses... getting finished in the very first round.

items.claim: Abdul Husan is unproven as a minus 400 favorite making his UFC debut.
items.quote: I think he's a little unproven. I would not be betting someone coming in at minus 400 on their UFC debut.
